case_title: FURLAN, MARIA ELENA et al vs. BAILEY, AMIE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MARIA-ELENA FURLAN FILED RE: 3-DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FURLAN, MARIA ELENA FURLAN, RUDY
